meta.title: Web Design Services | Unique Logic - One-Stop Multimedia Design and Website Production
meta.description: A one-stop solution for multimedia design, website production, and ongoing optimization. Regularly updating and optimizing your site improves professionalism and credibility while strengthening brand image and business value. Services include custom web design, WordPress CMS, Shopify setup, and mobile-responsive websites.

hero.subtitle_line1: One-stop multimedia design and website production services

intro.label: Service Overview
intro.p1: Design plays an important role in conveying information and improving user experience. Its ability to communicate complex information in an intuitive and engaging way while building brand image and identity is of critical value to both individuals and businesses.
intro.p2: Therefore, we provide personalized graphic design and web design services to help you enhance your brand image, attract your target audience and provide an excellent user experience.
intro.p3: Our professional design team will create unique and impactful design work based on your needs and goals to ensure you stand out in a highly competitive market.

web_design.label: Web Design Services
web_design.desc_line1: We provide a full range of web design solutions,
web_design.desc_line2: Helping you build a professional and compelling online presence.

f1.title: Custom Content Management Systems
f1.desc: We set up professional CMS platforms such as WordPress and Shopify, so you can manage website content easily and update pages without coding knowledge.

f2.title: E-commerce web design
f2.desc: Professional online store design and setup, including payment integration and shopping cart features, to deliver a seamless shopping experience and help you grow your online business.

offer.label: Service Scope
offer.desc_line2: covering all the features you need.

c1.title: SSL security certificate
c1.desc: Keep your website secure and encrypted

c3.title: Google Maps Integration
c3.desc: Make it easier for customers to find you

c6.title: Online inquiry form
c6.desc: Make it easier for customers to contact you

optimize.label: Website Optimization
optimize.title_line1: Keep your website regularly updated and
optimize.title_highlight: Reasons to optimize your web pages
optimize.desc_line1: Maintain and update your website regularly to
optimize.desc_line2: Ensure optimal performance and user experience.

items.i1: Enhance your website’s professionalism and credibility
Attract and maintain user attention and interest
Improve web page visibility and search engine rankings
items.i2: Deliver faster browsing speed and better performance
items.i3: Adapt to changing technology and design standards

uxui.label: UX/UI design
uxui.desc_line1: A UX/UI design review evaluates and analyzes website usability and design quality,
uxui.desc_line2: to ensure your site delivers excellent
uxui.desc_line3: user experience and visual design aesthetics.
uxui.desc_line4: It can optimize user experience, improve website performance, increase conversion rate, enhance brand image and increase market competitiveness.

f1.title: UI (User Interface)
f1.desc: We review interface flow, usability, and presentation quality, then analyze user needs and behavior patterns to refine UI/UX direction.

f2.title: UX (User Experience)
f2.desc: We use design to solve real user needs and habits, then iterate based on testing to optimize user experience, increase engagement, and support business outcomes.

s1.title: Initial consultation
s1.desc: Contact us via WhatsApp or fill out the online form to understand your needs and goals

s2.title: Requirements Analysis
s2.desc: Gain a deep understanding of your brand, target audience, and feature requirements

s3.title: Design Proposal
s3.desc: Provide design drafts and website architecture to confirm visual style and functional planning

s4.title: Development and production
s4.desc: Professional team for web development and design implementation

s5.title: Launch and support
s5.desc: Provide continuous technical support and maintenance services after the website is online

cta.title: Build a professional website and enhance your brand image!
cta.desc: Let Unique Logic’s professional design team create a unique online presence for you
